trades.reasoning: Full four-signal confirmation (RSI 59.3 bullish zone with room to run, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, volume surge) on a mildly risk-on day, and cash is above the $500 deploy threshold with open slots available.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted higher today with NASDAQ +0.9% and S&P 500 +0.4% — a neutral-to-mildly-positive session. With cash above the deploy threshold and a strong multi-signal candidate available (ERAS), we added one new high-conviction position while holding all existing positions unchanged.

market_education.summary_en: Both major indices posted modest gains today, with the NASDAQ slightly outperforming the S&P 500, suggesting continued but unspectacular risk appetite among investors. There was no major catalyst driving outsized moves, consistent with a steady grind-higher session rather than a sharp risk-on rally. Broad participation across tech and cyclical names supported the gains.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤溫和上揚，納斯達克指數升0.9%，標普500指數升0.4%，反映投資人風險偏好持續但未見明顯亢奮。市場缺乏重大催化因素，屬於穩步向上而非急速風險偏好升溫的格局，科技股與週期性股份普遍支持升勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: When multiple technical signals — like a MACD bullish crossover, RSI in the healthy 55-70 zone, price above its moving average, and a volume surge — all align together, it's a stronger sign of real buying interest than any single indicator alone. Waiting for this kind of confirmation helps filter out random noise and reduces the chance of chasing a false breakout.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當多個技術訊號同時出現——例如MACD黃金交叉、RSI處於55至70的健康區間、股價高於移動平均線，以及成交量放大——這比單一指標更能反映真實的買盤力量。等待這種多重訊號確認有助於過濾市場雜訊，減少追高假突破的風險。
